title: process_remote buffers full body before size check
description: In src/media.rs, process_remote calls resp.bytes().await before checking the size limit. reqwest buffers the entire response body into memory before returning. A server returning a multi-gigabyte body will OOM the process before the 10 MB check at line 95 is ever reached. Fix: stream the response with bytes_stream() and abort once the running total exceeds MAX_FILE_SIZE, or use .content_length() as an early reject hint combined with streaming.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
